mapper.select: SELECT A.w_date, IFNULL(LEFT(A.w_sdatetime,19),'') AS w_sdatetime, IFNULL(LEFT(A.w_edatetime,19),'') AS w_edatetime, IFNULL(LEFT(A.w_in_edatetime,19),'') AS w_in_edatetime, A.w_pnum, B.item_name AS w_pname, A.w_incnt, A.w_weight, B.steel_grade AS w_gang, B.t_grade AS w_t_gb, B.apply_cp AS w_cp, B.apply_temp1 AS w_qf, B.apply_temp2 AS w_tf, B.std_load AS w_std_weight, A.w_lot, C.h_val1, C.h_val2, C.h_val3, CASE WHEN w_in_edatetime IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE,w_sdatetime, w_in_edatetime) END AS w_intime, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY regtime) AS w_idx FROM tb_worklist A LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_standard AS B ON A.w_pnum = B.item_no LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_hardness AS C ON A.w_lot = C.h_wlot WHERE A.w_date = #{w_date}
SELECT * FROM tb_worklist WHERE 1=1 AND w_lot = #{w_lot}

SELECT item_no AS w_pnum, item_name AS w_pname, steel_grade AS w_gang, t_grade AS w_t_gb, apply_temp1 AS w_qf, apply_temp2 AS w_tf, apply_cp AS w_cp, std_load AS w_std_weight, hardness_req AS w_hardness FROM tb_standard WHERE 1=1
AND item_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{w_pnum},'%')
AND steel_grade LIKE CONCAT('%',#{w_gang},'%')
AND t_grade LIKE CONCAT('%',#{w_t_gb},'%')

SELECT * FROM v_alarmlist WHERE 1=1
AND a_stime >= CONCAT(#{a_sdate},' 00:00:00')
AND a_stime <= CONCAT(#{a_edate},' 23:59:59')
SELECT a_hogi, a_addr, a_desc, COUNT(*) AS a_cnt FROM v_alarmlist WHERE 1=1 AND a_stime >= CONCAT(#{a_sdate},' 00:00:00') AND a_stime <= CONCAT(#{a_edate},' 23:59:59') GROUP BY a_hogi, a_addr, a_desc

SELECT w_pnum AS m_pnum, w_pname AS m_pname, w_intime AS m_intime, w_incnt AS m_incnt, w_weight AS m_weight, w_std_weight AS m_std_weight, ROUND((w_weight / w_std_weight) * 100,1) AS m_weight_percent FROM ( SELECT machine AS w_machine, w_pnum, w_pname, SUM(in_diff) AS w_intime, SUM(w_incnt) AS w_incnt, SUM(w_weight) AS w_weight, SUM(std_load) AS w_std_weight FROM ( SELECT machine, w_pnum, item_name AS w_pname, w_date, w_sdatetime, w_in_edatetime, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w_sdatetime, CASE WHEN w_in_edatetime IS NULL OR w_in_edatetime = '' THEN w_sdatetime ELSE w_in_edatetime END ) AS in_diff, w_incnt, ROUND(w_weight,1) AS w_weight, std_load FROM tb_worklist AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT 'HT01' AS machine, CASE WHEN CAST(LEFT(curtime(),2) AS INT) < 8 THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY),'%Y-%m-%d 08:00:00') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d 08:00:00') END AS sdatetime, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS edatetime ) AS B ON A.w_machine = B.machine LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_standard AS C ON A.w_pnum = C.item_no WHERE 1=1 AND A.w_sdatetime >= B.sdatetime AND A.w_sdatetime <= B.edatetime ) AS A GROUP BY machine, w_pnum, w_pname ) AS B

SELECT wr_c1, wr_c2, wr_c3, wr_c4, '무' AS wr_c5, CONCAT(wr_in_stime,' / ',wr_in_etime) AS wr_c6, wr_hw_val AS wr_c7, '정상' AS wr_c8, '정상/30Hz' AS wr_c9, '3.5 m3/hr' AS wr_c10, '10℃ x 5분' AS wr_c11, '40분' AS wr_c12, '정상/25Hz' AS wr_c13, wr_oil_val AS wr_c14, 650 AS wr_c15, wr_cp_val AS wr_c16, '커튼:(좌:11 우:12);제트(좌:12, 중:12, 우:12)' AS wr_c17, wr_qf_hardness AS wr_c18, wr_tf_hardness AS wr_c19, '10℃ x 6분' AS wr_c20, '정상/30Hz' AS wr_c21, '40분' AS wr_c22, wr_rw_val AS wr_c23, '정상' AS wr_c24, '정상/40Hz' AS wr_c25, wr_byun_val AS wr_c26, '[LPG : 0.25 / AIR : 1.66] / 1.1 m3/hr' AS wr_c27, '0.231' AS wr_c28, wr_edatetime AS wr_c29 FROM ( SELECT MAX(item_name) AS wr_c1, MAX(steel_grade) AS wr_c2, MAX(t_grade) AS wr_c3, w_lot AS wr_c4, MAX(w_sdatetime) AS wr_in_stime, MAX(w_in_edatetime) AS wr_in_etime, MAX(w_hw_report) AS wr_hw_val, MAX(w_qf_report) AS wr_qf_val, MAX(w_cp_report) AS wr_cp_val, MAX(w_oil_report) AS wr_oil_val, MAX(w_tf_report) AS wr_tf_val, MAX(w_rw_report) AS wr_rw_val, MAX(w_byun_report) AS wr_byun_val, MAX(hardness_req) AS wr_qf_hardness, MAX(hardness_req) AS wr_tf_hardness, MAX(w_edatetime) AS wr_edatetime FROM ( SELECT *, CASE WHEN LEFT(C.regtime,16) = LEFT(AA.w_hw_time,16) THEN hw_sp ELSE 0 END AS w_hw_report, CASE WHEN LEFT(C.regtime,16) = LEFT(AA.w_qf_time,16) THEN qf1_sp ELSE 0 END AS w_qf_report, CASE WHEN LEFT(C.regtime,16) = LEFT(AA.w_qf_time,16) THEN cp_a_sp ELSE 0 END AS w_cp_report, CASE WHEN LEFT(C.regtime,16) = LEFT(AA.w_oil_time,16) THEN oil_cool_sp ELSE 0 END AS w_oil_report, CASE WHEN LEFT(C.regtime,16) = LEFT(AA.w_tf_time,16) THEN tf1_sp ELSE 0 END AS w_tf_report, CASE WHEN LEFT(C.regtime,16) = LEFT(AA.w_rw_time,16) THEN rw_sp ELSE 0 END AS w_rw_report, CASE WHEN LEFT(C.regtime,16) = LEFT(AA.w_byun_time,16) THEN 1012 ELSE 0 END AS w_byun_report FROM ( SELECT w_machine, w_date, w_pnum, w_sdatetime, w_in_edatetime, w_edatetime, w_lot, w_incnt, w_weight, item_no, item_name, steel_grade, t_grade, apply_temp1 AS std_qf, apply_temp2 AS std_tf, apply_cp AS std_cp, std_load, hardness_req, DATE_ADD(w_sdatetime, INTERVAL 20 MINUTE) AS w_hw_time, DATE_ADD(w_sdatetime, INTERVAL 100 MINUTE) AS w_qf_time, DATE_ADD(w_sdatetime, INTERVAL 180 MINUTE) AS w_oil_time, DATE_ADD(w_sdatetime, INTERVAL 300 MINUTE) AS w_tf_time, DATE_ADD(w_sdatetime, INTERVAL 400 MINUTE) AS w_rw_time, DATE_ADD(w_sdatetime, INTERVAL 500 MINUTE) AS w_byun_time FROM tb_worklist AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_standard AS B ON A.w_pnum = B.item_no WHERE 1=1 AND A.regtime >= CONCAT(#{w_date},' 08:00:00') AND A.regtime < CONCAT(DATE_ADD(#{w_date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY),' 08:00:00') ) AS AA LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT *,'HT01' AS temp_machine FROM tb_temp WHERE 1=1 AND regtime >= CONCAT(#{w_date},' 08:00:00') AND regtime < CONCAT(DATE_ADD(#{w_date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY),' 08:00:00') ) AS C ON AA.w_machine = C.temp_machine ) AS BB GROUP BY w_lot ) AS CC

SELECT w_machine, ROUND((w_weight / w_std_weight) * 100,1) AS m_weight_percent, ROUND((w_hr / w_worktime) * 100,1) AS m_time_percent FROM ( SELECT machine AS w_machine, w_pnum, w_pname, SUM(in_diff) AS w_intime, SUM(w_incnt) AS w_incnt, SUM(w_weight) AS w_weight, SUM(work_diff) AS w_worktime, SUM(std_load) AS w_std_weight, SUM(w_hr) AS w_hr FROM ( SELECT machine, w_pnum, item_name AS w_pname, w_date, w_sdatetime, w_in_edatetime, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w_sdatetime, CASE WHEN w_in_edatetime IS NULL OR w_in_edatetime = '' THEN w_sdatetime ELSE w_in_edatetime END) AS in_diff, w_incnt, ROUND(w_weight,1) AS w_weight, std_load, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w_sdatetime, CASE WHEN w_edatetime IS NULL OR w_edatetime = '' THEN w_sdatetime ELSE w_edatetime END) AS work_diff, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, sdatetime, edatetime) AS w_hr FROM tb_worklist AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT 'HT01' AS machine, CASE WHEN CAST(LEFT(curtime(),2) AS INT) < 8 THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY),'%Y-%m-%d 08:00:00') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d 08:00:00') END AS sdatetime, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS edatetime ) AS B ON A.w_machine = B.machine LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_standard AS C ON A.w_pnum = C.item_no WHERE 1=1 AND A.w_sdatetime >= B.sdatetime AND A.w_sdatetime <= B.edatetime ) AS A GROUP BY machine ) AS B
